name: Lifestyle Global Brands Limited
summary: Lifestyle Global Brands Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration of gold in West Africa. It owns 100% interest of an exploration permit for the exploration of gold and base metals on the South Morila (Kola) concession, which covers an area of 150 square kilometers located in the Sikasso Region of southern Mali. The company was formerly known as Goldbelt Empires Limited and changed its name to Lifestyle Global Brands Limited in December 2018. Lifestyle Global Brands Limited is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
